profile.projects:
AI Career Agent – Autonomous Job & Internship Assistant | CrewAI, LangChain, GPT-4o-mini, Streamlit
•
Built a 4-phase agentic AI pipeline (Discover → Match → Apply → Track) that autonomously searches job
portals and auto-submits applications with an 80%+ match accuracy target.
•
Implemented an AI-powered Skill Gap Coach using LangChain that analyzes JD-to-profile mismatches,
identifies skillgaps, and generates personalized prep reports with mock interview prompts and company intel.
•
Developed a real-time Streamlit tracking dashboard with SMTP/IMAP email integration, reducing missed
follow-ups by 40% and saving 40+ hours/week of manual job searching effort.
AgriSure – AI & Blockchain Crop Insurance | React.js, Python, Blockchain Integration
•
Developed a decentralized application (dApp) using Smart Contracts to create transparent, tamper-proof audit
trails for insurance claims.
•
Integrated a Random Forest model (Scikit-Learn) to predict crop yields based on historical weather data,
assisting in accurate claim validation.
•
Reduced verification time significantly by automating the approval workflow between farmers and insurers.
TalentTrack – Recruitment Management System | Salesforce Platform, Apex, LWC
•
Designed a custom data model using Standard and Custom Objects to track the hiring lifecycle.
•
Built a Record-Triggered Flow to automatically update application statuses and send email alerts to hiring
managers, eliminating manual follow-ups.
profile.achievements:
•
5th Place : ICPC Chennai Multi Provisional Contest 2025.
•
1st Place (out of 30+ Teams):  HackTheHammer 2024 (Coding Event).
•

•

PROFESSIONAL PROFILE 
Computer Science undergraduate (Class of 2027) with a strong foundation in Data Structures and Algorithms. 
Passionate about the Salesforce Ecosystem, with practical proficiency in Apex, Lightning,Visualforce, and Flow 
Automation. Proven problem-solver (ICPC Top 5 Finalist) seeking to leverage logic and development skills in a 
Salesforce Developer or Administrator role.

Salesforce Platform: VisualForce,Apex, LWC,Flow Builder, SOQL, Security (Profiles, Roles), Object Modeling. 
Programming: Java (Strong DSA), JavaScript, SQL, Python. 
Web & Tools: HTML/CSS.

identifies skillgaps, and generates personalized prep reports with mock interview prompts and company intel. 
• 
Developed a real-time Streamlit tracking dashboard with SMTP/IMAP email integration, reducing missed 
follow-ups by 40% and saving 40+ hours/week of manual job searching effort.

• 
Reduced verification time significantly by automating the approval workflow between farmers and insurers.

profile.resumeText:
MACHA JAYANTH  
Phone: 6300021278  
Email: 23r11a05c2@gcet.edu.in  
LinkedIn : (12) JAYANTH MACHA | LinkedIn
  
Objective  
As a passionate and driven B.Tech student specializing in Computer Science, I am eager to 
leverage my skills in programming, web development, and problem-solving to contribute to 
innovative projects. I seek opportunities where I can grow professionally, collaborate with 
diverse teams, and apply my knowledge of modern technologies like MERN stack and Java 
to create impactful solutions. With a strong foundation in coding and a desire to continuously 
learn, I aim to make a positive difference in the tech world while enhancing my capabilities 
for future challenges. 
  
Education

Technical Skills

• 
Web Technologies: HTML, CSS, JavaScript  
  
Projects  
1) Agrisure AI – Decentralized Crop Insurance & Subsidy Management System 
          Blockchain-based platform with AI verification for smart claim recording and audit 
trails. 

• 
Yield prediction and integration with local market data for approximate crop 
valuation. 
2) TutorFinder Website  
• 
Platform enabling students to find tutors and graduates to register as tutors. 
• 
Facilitated academic collaboration and seamless tutor-student matching. 
3) NextGen Authentication System  
• 
Designed a secure, modern authentication mechanism compared to traditional 
methods. 
• 
Focused on enhanced security and usability in networked environments. 
4) Personal Finance Tracker  
• 
Desktop application to record, categorize, and analyze personal financial transactions. 
• 
Provided insights to optimize savings and track spending patterns. 
5) Cricket Scoreboard  
• 
Interactive cricket scoring system tracking runs, overs, and wickets. 
• 
Enabled real-time score management through a command-line interface. 
 
  
Achievements

1st Prize in HACKTHEHAMMER, BHASWARA 2K24
